name: Powerfleet (formerly I.D. Systems) Fleet API
what_it_does: Powerfleet REST API for industrial fleet management including forklifts, trailers, and airport ground support equipment. Enables AI agents to manage industrial vehicle telemetry and utilization tracking for warehouse and manufacturing fleet management, handle forklift impact detection and operator safety management for industrial safety programs, access trailer tracking and yard management for distribution and logistics, retrieve airport ground support equipment (GSE) monitoring for aviation operations, manage driver/operator authentication and access control for industrial fleet security, handle battery and charging management for electric industrial vehicle fleets, access equipment utilization and productivity analytics for fleet ROI management, retrieve predictive maintenance data for industrial vehicle service planning, manage safety compliance and OSHA incident reporting for industrial environments, and integrate Powerfleet data with WMS, ERP, and maintenance management systems.
use_cases: Tracking forklifts from warehouse management agents
Monitoring forklift impacts from industrial safety agents
Managing trailers from yard management agents
Tracking airport ground equipment from aviation agents
not_for: Over-the-road trucking without industrial/warehouse fleet focus
Passenger vehicle fleet without industrial vehicle specialty
Small warehouses without enterprise industrial fleet scale
best_when: A distribution center, manufacturing facility, or airport with industrial vehicles using Powerfleet wants AI agents to automate forklift tracking, impact monitoring, operator authentication, and utilization analytics.
avoid_when: OSHA SAFETY RISK: Forklift impact detection automation must comply with OSHA 1910.178 powered industrial truck standards — automated impact response (lock-out, incident reporting) must follow OSHA-compliant post-accident procedures including operator evaluation before returning to work. Automated access control for industrial vehicles must not override manual safety override capabilities. Powerfleet was formed from I.D. Systems and Pointer Telocation merger (2019); API may reflect legacy product differences.

auth.notes: Powerfleet uses OAuth 2.0 and API key. Developer portal at powerfleet.com/developers. Webhooks for fleet events. REST API with JSON. Woodcliff Lake, New Jersey HQ. Public (PWFL NASDAQ). Formed from I.D. Systems + Pointer Telocation merger (2019). 700,000+ connected assets. Strong in forklift, trailer, and airport GSE telematics. Competes with Samsara (industrial), SpinCar, and Yale/Raymond forklifts' native telematics for industrial fleet.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — per-device monthly subscription
pricing.notes: Woodcliff Lake, New Jersey. Powerfleet (PWFL NASDAQ). I.D. Systems + Pointer merger 2019. 700,000+ assets. Industrial vehicle and trailer telematics specialty. Competes with Samsara and Geotab for industrial fleet.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; documented per integration

known_agent_gotchas: OSHA SAFETY RISK: Forklift impact automation must follow OSHA 1910.178 post-accident procedures; automated vehicle lock-out after impact must allow manual override and require operator evaluation before return to work
Operator authentication access control — automated forklift access control must not prevent emergency egress or override manual safety systems
I.D. Systems vs. Pointer heritage — Powerfleet formed from two companies with different API histories; product lines may have different API surfaces based on legacy platform
Industrial indoor GPS limitations — forklifts operate indoors; GPS tracking may use Wi-Fi or RFID positioning rather than GPS; positioning accuracy differs from outdoor vehicle tracking
Forklift OEM integration — forklift manufacturers (Toyota, Crown, Yale) have native telematics; Powerfleet hardware competes with OEM systems; verify compatibility with customer forklift fleet
Battery charging automation — automated electric forklift charging management via Powerfleet must coordinate with warehouse charging infrastructure and WMS battery management systems
agent_readiness.security_notes: Industrial fleet. SOC2. OAuth2/API key. US/EU. Industrial vehicle and operator data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Industrial fleet. SOC2. OAuth2. US/EU. Industrial vehicle data.
